messages.content: proofread: Please allow me to further explain two queries which you asked during the meeting but I think I did not answer correctly and completely.
Please allow me to further explain two queries that you raised during the meeting. I believe I may not have provided a correct and comprehensive answer to them.
proofread:  regarding the other two publications which I coauthored with my students. They are different circumstances with the paper relevant to Mr Wang Yueming.
Regarding the other two publications in which I coauthored with my students, I would like to clarify that they are distinct from the paper concerning Mr. Wang Yueming.

proofreading: Hong Yuan was my FYP student in 2014-2015 subsequently my MA student in 2015-2018. The article was completed in Chinese based on the FYP and published in Chinese in 2017 when Hong Yuan was the MA student. As the main contributor to the article, we decided to put Hong Yuan as the first author.  The authorship order was discussed with the student and got the student’s oral agreement.

Hong Yuan was my FYP student in 2014-2015 and later became my MA student from 2015-2018. The article in question was completed during Hong Yuan's FYP and subsequently published in Chinese in 2017, when Hong Yuan was still an MA student. As the main contributor to the article, it was decided to list Hong Yuan as the first author. The authorship order was discussed with the student and received their oral agreement.

proofreading: Tay Qin Xuan was my FYP student in 2015-2016. When I discussed the FYP with Qin Xuan, I suggested to formally published the paper in English to respond to the American scholar’s paper, which I cited in my course - HC2010 Classical Chinese Fiction. Due to the original texts of the Tang dynasty tale had been translated in the English academia, we wrote this short article in English fast. Because Qin Xuan contributed to the English version as well, we decided to put her as the second author. The authorship order was discussed with the student and got the student’s oral agreement.

Tay Qin Xuan was my FYP student in 2015-2016. During our discussions about the FYP, I suggested formally publishing the paper in English as a response to an American scholar's publication that I referred to in my course - HC2010 Classical Chinese Fiction. Given that the original texts of the Tang dynasty tale had already been translated in English academia, we expedited the writing of this short article in English. As Qin Xuan also contributed to the English version, we decided to list her as the second author. The authorship order was discussed with the student and received their oral agreement.

proofreading: The situation of the English article published in 2018, which incorporated ideas and materials from Mr Wang Yueming’s FYP in 2014 with different title, structure and conclusion, is different with the two articles above. As I mentioned in the meeting, Mr Wang Yueming was quite busy after graduated in 2014, he contributed little to the article in English. That’s why I did not put his name as the second author at that time. In retrospect, I now realize that it would have been wise to include a citation to the FYP in the references. If the things could be started over, I would even put him as the second author.

The situation regarding the English article published in 2018, which incorporated ideas and materials from Mr. Wang Yueming's FYP in 2014 but with a different title, structure, and conclusion, is distinct from the aforementioned two articles. As I mentioned during the meeting, Mr. Wang Yueming was quite occupied after graduating in 2014, and he made only a minor contribution to the English article. That is why I did not list him as the second author at that time. In hindsight, I now recognize that it would have been prudent to include a citation to his FYP in the references. If I could start over, I would even consider including him as the second author.

proofreading: Secondly, the citation of No. 25 in the article in Pg. 258 was pointed out during the meeting, “Details refer to another paper: “Escapist Imagery in Ruan Ji’s poetry” (unpublished)”. This is the paper I was working on to particularly talk about the escapist imagery in Ruan Ji’s poetry (in English as well) and may incorporated ideas and materials from Mr Wang Yueming’s FYP. However, later on, I realized the novelty of the paper may not strong. Consequestly, I put this paper on hold to get more thoughts. It is not referring to the FYP. Sorry if my expression was wrong.

Secondly, during the meeting, the citation of No. 25 on page 258 in the article was brought up. It states, "Details refer to another paper: 'Escapist Imagery in Ruan Ji's poetry' (unpublished)." I want to clarify that this was a separate paper I was working on, specifically discussing the escapist imagery in Ruan Ji's poetry in English. While it may have included ideas and materials from Mr. Wang Yueming's FYP, I later realized that the paper's novelty might not be strong enough. Consequently, I decided to put it on hold to gather more thoughts. It is not referring to the FYP. I apologize if my expression was unclear.

proofreading: My dominant language is Mandarin, while English is my second language. Please be aware that my expressions during the meeting may not fully convey my views. This is particularly the case since I am currently feeling deeply hopeless and sad so sometimes I could not articulate my thoughts.

My dominant language is Mandarin, while English is my second language. Please understand that my expressions during the meeting might not have fully expressed my views. It is particularly challenging for me to articulate my thoughts at the moment, as I am currently feeling deeply hopeless and saddened.
proofreading: It is particularly challenging for me to articulate my thoughts at the moment under great pressure, as I am currently feeling deeply hopeless and saddened.

It is especially difficult for me to articulate my thoughts accurately at the moment due to the tremendous pressure I am under. I am currently feeling deeply hopeless and saddened, which further compounds this challenge.
proofreading: Please allow me to further explain two queries that you raised during the meeting on Friday.
Please allow me to provide further clarification on two queries you raised during our meeting on Friday.

proofreading: As I mentioned in the meeting, Mr Wang Yueming was quite occupied after graduating in 2014 and could not continue the paper’s writing, that is why I did not list him as the second author at that time.

As I mentioned during the meeting, Mr. Wang Yueming was heavily engaged in other activities after graduating in 2014 and was unable to continue writing the paper. That is the reason why I did not include him as the second author at that time.
proofreading: Later I realized the paper’s novelty might not be strong enough. Consequently, I decided to put it on hold to gather more thoughts.

Later, I came to the realization that the paper's level of novelty may not have been strong enough. As a result, I decided to temporarily put it on hold in order to gather more thoughts and potentially enhance its originality.
proofreading: he was heavily engaged in his teaching job after graduating and was unable to continue joining the paper’s writing.
He was heavily involved in his teaching job after graduating and was unable to contribute to the writing of the paper.
proofreading: I believe I may not have provided a more suitable and comprehensive answer to them.
I believe my previous answers may not have been suitable and comprehensive enough.
